meta.title: Essays
meta.description: A native macOS client for the Memos self-hosted note-taking service.

hero.headline: Write and read without noise
hero.subhead: Essays is a native macOS client for Memos, focused on capturing thoughts, daily logs, and inspiration with a calm UI.

story.title: An editor that stays out of your way
story.lead: A three-column layout keeps navigation, timeline, and details always within reach.

items.title: Timeline for daily flow
items.body: Browse memos chronologically and keep context while you write.

items.title: Attachments at a glance
items.body: Preview images instantly with a dedicated attachments gallery.

items.title: AI assistance on device
items.body: Summarize, rewrite, and expand with local Foundation Models.
items.alt: Apple AI Assistant panel in Essays

items.title: A calm starting point
items.body: Empty states guide the next step without noise or clutter.

items.title: Universal App
items.body: Native support for macOS, iPadOS, and iOS with a unified experience.

items.title: Three-Column Navigation
items.body: A responsive NavigationSplitView layout for sidebar, timeline, and details.

items.title: Premium Native UI
items.body: LiquidGlass aesthetics with glassmorphism, thin materials, and micro-animations.

items.title: Apple AI Assistant
items.body: On-device Foundation Models for private text intelligence.

items.title: Quick Capture & Global Shortcuts
items.body: Capture ideas instantly with customizable global hotkeys.

items.title: Attachments Gallery
items.body: A dedicated sidebar grid for browsing image memos.

items.title: Rich Media Previews
items.body: Quick Look for images and MapKit popovers for location tags.

items.title: Interactive Calendar
items.body: Monthly calendar in the sidebar for filtering daily logs.

items.title: Fully Localized
items.body: Complete support for English and Simplified Chinese.

items.title: Privacy First
items.body: Direct connection to your self-hosted Memos server via access tokens.

assistant.title: Apple AI Assistant
assistant.body: All AI processing happens locally on your Mac to keep your data private.

download.title: Download
download.body: Get the latest .dmg or .app from GitHub Releases.
